'''Rhirren''' was a [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] of the [[Myyydril]] tribe that lived in the [[Myyydril Caverns/Legends|Myyydril Caverns]] on [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]. He worked as a guard, protecting his village from threats like the [[Urnsor'is]].

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Rhirren appeared as a non-player character in the video game Star Wars Galaxies, a massively multiplayer online roleplaying game developed by Sony Online Entertainment and published by LucasArts, prior to its closure on [[December 15]], 2011.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Rage of the Wookiees]]'' {{1st}}
